description_long: This is a Japanese-style katana sword displayed on a wooden stand, accompanied by a matching black sheath. The blade is slightly curved and appears to be made of metal, with a matte black finish. The handle is wrapped in black material and features a series of red circular accents, providing both grip and decorative flair. The guard is simple and black, separating the blade from the handle. The wooden stand is light brown, designed to hold both the sword and its sheath securely. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, with a touch of traditional Japanese design.
description: A black katana sword with red-accented handle, displayed on a wooden stand with a matching black sheath.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the katana, its handle with red accents, the black sheath, and the wooden display stand.
description_view_1: Front-on view showing the narrow profile of the blade and handle, with the stand and sheath aligned behind.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, showing the katana, sheath, and stand from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stand and the alignment of the sword and sheath.
attribute_handle_design: straight handle with black wrap and red circular accents
